signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No ceasefire extension, resolution, or deal has been confirmed; weekend talks in Islamabad ended without agreement, but both sides are discussing a second round of negotiations before the two-week truce expires early next week.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?

signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders & 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 202
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders & 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 2026, Bolstered by Alpenglow Upgrade** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Solana's network activity has surged, with real-world assets (RWAs) reaching $1.71 billion (up 45% in a month) and stablecoin transactions hitting $650 billion in one month, more than double prior records[1].
matched_markets: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $74,000 on April 15?
Solana Up or Down - April 15, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2.16% (up from 2.00% in Feb)** | NO | LOW confidence

South Korea's year-over-year inflation rate rose slightly to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February 2026, with month-to-month inflation at 0.34%.[2] This is the most recent monthly data available (as of search results), but no breaking announcements, confirmations, or resolutions were reported
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: US Imposes Blockade on Iranian Shipping in Strait of Hormuz Amid Faltering Ceasefire Talks | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US Imposes Blockade on Iranian Shipping in Strait of Hormuz Amid Faltering Ceasefire Talks | NO | MED confidence**  
Tensions rise as the US enacts a blockade on Iranian oil tankers (allowing other transit under monitoring), with President Trump pressuring Iran to accept terms; ceasefire talks are faltering, raising risks of renewed conflict, but no resolution announced.[2]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
